query:
SELECT 
                time_bucket($1::interval, ts_ingest) as "bucket!",
                COUNT(*) as "count!"
            FROM core.events
            WHERE ts_ingest >= $2 AND ts_ingest <= $3
            GROUP BY time_bucket($1::interval, ts_ingest)
            ORDER BY time_bucket($1::interval, ts_ingest) ASC
            LIMIT $4
